gui.dragonminez.minigame.shadowdummy.des: Manifest a Shadow Dummy made of your own Ki. The dummy receives a share of your stats and fights independently, but while it lives you cannot recover beyond what you have left — your offensive stats, defense and max resources are reduced by the percentage given. The dummy dies when slain; you can only have one at a time.
gui.dragonminez.shadow_dummy.req_kill: Defeat a Shadow Dummy at least once
gui.dragonminez.shadow_dummy.desc_short: Create a Shadow Dummy to fight with. This dummy will have a percentage of your stats, but you'll temporarily lose the same amount of stats while your Dummy is alive.
gui.dragonminez.shadow_dummy.requirement: You do not meet the requirements to summon a Shadow Dummy.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.rhythm.howto: Hit the matching arrow (←↓↑→) as a note reaches the center. Hold notes: keep the key down. Fill the bar to level up!
gui.dragonminez.minigame.control.howto: Use ←/→ or A/D to keep the marker inside the green zone.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.memory.howto: Watch the arrow sequence, then repeat it in order.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.precision.howto: Click inside each circle the moment its ring meets it.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.gravity.howto: Tap the highlighted side (←/→) to push up. Avoid the wrong side!
gui.dragonminez.minigame.rhythm.desc: A two-lane rhythm challenge. Notes of any arrow (←, ↓, ↑, →) slide in from both sides toward the two center target lines. Press the matching arrow (in either lane) the instant a note reaches its target for a Perfect, slightly off for a Good. Hold notes must be held down until they finish, and quick double notes ask for two fast presses. Each hit fills the progress bar while time and misses drain it; fill the bar to level up — notes already on screen speed up to match. The run ends if you miss 5 of your last 10 notes.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.control.desc: Slide your marker (←/→ or A/D) to keep it inside the moving green zone for 5 seconds straight and clear the level. Each level the zone shrinks and moves faster. Fail to hold it in time and the run ends.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.memory.desc: A sequence of arrows flashes for a moment, then hides. Repeat it in the exact order. Each level adds an arrow and shortens the show time. One wrong input ends the run.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.precision.desc: Circles pop up all over the screen, each with a ring shrinking toward it. Click inside a circle the moment the ring meets the target for a Perfect, close for a Good. A mistimed or ignored circle flashes red, fades out and costs points. Reach the rising score threshold to level up (faster rings). The run ends if your score drops below zero or you miss 5 of your last 10 circles.
gui.dragonminez.minigame.gravity.desc: An indicator falls down a bar. Each beat the game lights up one side at random (←/→); tap that side (keys or left/right click) to push the indicator up. Tapping the wrong side flashes red and shoves it down hard. Keep the indicator above the control line long enough to clear a level (dropping below drains progress fast); each level gravity grows. Let it hit the bottom and the run ends.
gui.dragonminez.spacepod.title: Space Pod
gui.dragonminez.lines.karin.name: Master Korin
gui.dragonminez.lines.karin.main: Welcome to Korin Tower, %s! Train hard and you will become stronger! Do you need anything from me?
gui.dragonminez.lines.karin.idle: Hm? Another visitor? Few have the strength to climb all the way up here. The Senzu Beans are looking particularly ripe today, if you were wondering.
gui.dragonminez.lines.karin.training: Alright, I'll help you train. But don't expect it to be easy — I didn't teach Goku everything he knows by going soft on him, after all.
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.name: Elder Guru
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.main: Greetings %s, I am Elder Guru, the wise leader of the Namekians. May I assist you in your journey?
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.evil: You have become too evil. I will not help you unlock your Potential. Get out of my sight!
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.level: You need to have your Potential Unlock skill at level 10 to unlock your Potential further.
command.dragonminez.tech.experience_succ: Updated experience of Ki technique %s for %s.
command.dragonminez.tech.experience_mult: Updated experience of Ki technique %s for %s players.
gui.dragonminez.lines.dende.name: Dende
gui.dragonminez.lines.dende.main: Hello %s, I am Dende, the Guardian of Earth. How can I assist you today?
gui.dragonminez.lines.dende.heal: Your wounds look serious. Let me help... There. The Dragon Balls blessed me with healing, and I'll use it as long as this planet needs protecting.
gui.dragonminez.lines.dende.idle: Guardian duties keep me quite busy, but I'll always make time for those who protect this planet. It's what Kami himself would have wanted for all of us.
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.name: King Yemma
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.main: Welcome to the Otherworld, %s. I am King Yemma, the overseer of souls. Do you want to come back to Earth?
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.revive: You need to talk to Fortuneteller Baba to be revived first!
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.idle: Hmm. Another soul before my desk. Do you have any idea how much paperwork passes through the Otherworld daily? Even death doesn't slow the queue down.
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.denied: Your record does not warrant a second chance at this time. Even Vegeta had to earn his way back. My decision is final. Next!
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.name: Fortuneteller Baba
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.main: Greetings %s, I am Fortuneteller Baba. I can help you return to the world of the living. You need to wait %d more seconds before being able to revive.
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.revived: §dFortuneteller Baba§r: You have been revived! Go back to §eKing Yemma§r to return to Earth.
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.idle: Ohohoho! The spirits are swirling around you today... I sense great destiny — or perhaps great foolishness. Hard to tell with you living types, dearie!
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.wait: The spirits still need time to prepare the ritual, dear. Come back in %d more seconds. Even the dead cannot be rushed into these things!
gui.dragonminez.lines.popo.name: Mr Popo
gui.dragonminez.lines.popo.main: Welcome back to Kami's Lookout, %s. Can I help you with something? Maybe do you want to train or change your haircut?
gui.dragonminez.lines.popo.training: So you want to train, right? I can summon you a dummy, or we can practice your reflexes with a rhythm game. What do you choose?
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.name: Dr. Gero
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.main: Ah, a new test subject! I am Dr. Gero, the greatest scientific mind in the universe. The only one left of the Red Ribbon Army. I can offer you a unique opportunity...
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.offer: I can convert you into an android, granting you immense power and unique abilities. However, this process comes with its own risks.
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.confirm: Are you sure? This process is irreversible and you'll lose access to your old transformations, however, you'll gain access to a new world of power!
gui.dragonminez.lines.toribot.name: Toribot
gui.dragonminez.lines.toribot.main: Beep boop! I am Toribot, thanks for visiting me! It's kinda lonely here with King Kai...
gui.dragonminez.lines.toribot.idle: Beep boop! Another character wandering around in my universe... Funny how that works, isn't it? I drew all of this up myself, you know. Every last bit.
gui.dragonminez.lines.toribot.training: Sure, I'll help you train! After all, I invented the entire power-scaling system in the first place. Nobody knows it better than I do. Beep boop!
gui.dragonminez.lines.piccolo.name: Piccolo
gui.dragonminez.lines.piccolo.main: What is it, %s? If you need to recover or carry some extra burden for your training, I can help. Speak.
gui.dragonminez.lines.piccolo.weight_pro: How much weight do you want, %s? Type a number. Don't blame me if you can barely move afterwards.
gui.dragonminez.lines.roshi.name: Master Roshi
gui.dragonminez.lines.roshi.main: Heh heh... Welcome, %s! Hard work is the path to true strength. If you want some weighted gear to toughen up your training, just say the word.
gui.dragonminez.lines.roshi.weight_promp: How much weight can you handle, %s? Type a number. Turtle School training is no joke!
gui.dragonminez.lines.kingkai.name: King Kai
gui.dragonminez.lines.kingkai.main: So you made it across Snake Way, %s! If you want to train under this planet's gravity, I can lend you some weighted gear. Ha ha ha!
gui.dragonminez.lines.kingkai.weight_pro: How much weight do you want, %s? Type a number. And don't forget to laugh at my jokes!
message.dragonminez.roshi.weight_given: §aMaster Roshi: §rThere you go. %s kg of weighted gear. Now get to training!
message.dragonminez.kingkai.weight_given: §aKing Kai: §rHere. %s kg of weighted gear. Let's see you move under that!
gui.dragonminez.lines.oldkai.name: Elder Kai
gui.dragonminez.lines.oldkai.main: Ah, a visitor! I am the Elder Kai. If your heart is pure and your potential ripe, I can unlock the power sleeping within you... the Ultimate.
gui.dragonminez.lines.oldkai.evil: Your heart is far too clouded with darkness. I will not draw out the power of someone like you. Begone!
gui.dragonminez.lines.oldkai.level: Your potential is not yet ripe. Train your Potential Unlock to its peak and then return to me.
gui.dragonminez.lines.oldkai.success: Incredible! Your hidden power has fully awakened. Use this Ultimate strength wisely!
gui.dragonminez.lines.babidi.name: Babidi
gui.dragonminez.lines.babidi.main: Heh heh heh... I sense the evil swirling within you. Bow to me, and I shall brand you with the Majin mark and grant you power beyond imagining!
gui.dragonminez.lines.babidi.already: You already bear my Majin mark, fool. Now go and spread destruction!
gui.dragonminez.lines.babidi.too_good: Bah! Your heart is far too kind. The Majin mark only takes root in the wicked. Get out of my sight!

race.dragonminez.human.desc: They are a terrestrial race with highly versatile combat skills. While they lack the innate power of other races, they are incredibly resourceful and tenacious. They stand out for their perseverance and courage, able to overcome their limitations through training and discipline.
race.dragonminez.saiyan.desc: They are a warrior race born for combat. Their innate ability to grow stronger after each battle makes them formidable opponents. They can even transform into powerful Super Saiyans and take their abilities to unimaginable levels.
race.dragonminez.namekian.desc: They are a peaceful yet powerful race, with great regenerative abilities and a natural connection to magic and nature. They are known for their wisdom, energy control, and their ability to fuse with others of their kind, increasing their power.
race.dragonminez.frostdemon.desc: They are a race of intergalactic conquerors with immense power and boundless cruelty. Their ability to transform and increase their power makes them formidable enemies. Despite their fragile appearance, they are some of the deadliest creatures in the universe.
race.dragonminez.bioandroid.desc: They are artificially created beings, combining the DNA of the most powerful races. With the ability to absorb other beings and increase their power to unimaginable levels, these creatures are adaptable and dangerous, designed to be invincible.
race.dragonminez.majin.desc: They are a magical and unpredictable race with enormous destructive potential, with a unique ability to regenerate and change form. Though they may seem playful or childish, they are extremely dangerous when they unleash their true power.
class.dragonminez.warrior.passive.desc: Landing 3 melee hits in a row (each connecting, none blocked) grants a Fury stack, up to 5. Each stack increases STM regen by 10%; at 5 stacks you also gain 10% defense penetration. Stacks refresh when you deal damage and fade if you stop.
class.dragonminez.spiritualist.passive.d: Damaging Ki attacks have 20% reduced cooldown. Those that also apply a debuff get 15% reduced cooldown instead, but the debuff lasts 25% longer.
Strike attacks deal up to 25% more damage based on the target's missing health (no bonus above 75% HP, full bonus at or below 25% HP).
class.dragonminez.berserker.passive.desc: Below 66% HP you gain 25% HP regen and 10% crit chance. Below 33% HP this rises to 75% HP regen and 25% crit chance.
class.dragonminez.paladin.passive.desc: 15% of the damage your party members take is redirected to you. You heal for 15% of the damage your party members deal.
class.dragonminez.tank.passive.desc: 50% of your stamina regen is granted as bonus HP regen (not a conversion). Healing you receive (passive or ally skills, not from eating) is 25% more effective. Below 30% HP both bonuses are doubled.
class.dragonminez.enchanter.passive.desc: Healing Ki attacks have 20% reduced cooldown. Those that also grant an ally buff get 15% reduced cooldown instead, but the buff lasts 25% longer.

dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.ros: Listen carefully — I founded the Turtle School for a reason. Before Goku could fly, he was delivering milk at full sprint with a boulder on his back. My training has forged the greatest warriors this world has ever seen. Think you're ready to begin?

The Kamehameha took me fifty years to perfect. Your impatience is already showing. Slow down, breathe, and feel every movement. Real strength comes from knowing your limits — and then shattering them completely.
Ha! You remind me of Goku when he was young — sharp instincts, stubborn spirit. I've trained warriors who went on to save this entire planet. You might just be walking down that same road, kid.

Even an old master never truly stops learning. I may look like I'm just sitting here, but every movement around me is a lesson. The Turtle School survives because wisdom outlasts raw power every single time.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.gok: Hey, I've been thinking — training alone only gets you so far. Piccolo, Vegeta, Hit... every great fight I've had taught me something new. How about it? Let's push each other past our limits!
That's it, don't hold back! When I fought Frieza on Namek I didn't have time to second-guess myself. Push through the pain — that's where real growth actually starts, I promise you that!

Yeah! That's what I'm talking about! You've got real fighting spirit. You know, Whis says the key to Ultra Instinct is letting the body move without the mind interfering. Honestly, you're already starting to get there!
Man, I'm starving... Hey, if you're ever up for a spar later just say the word! Chi-Chi says I train too much, but honestly I don't think there's really such a thing as too much training.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.bul: Okay, look — I'm in the middle of something critical and I need specific materials I can't exactly just grab myself. I built the Dragon Radar AND a time machine, so trust me, I know exactly what I'm doing. I just need the parts.

You're not back yet? I'm trying to cross-reference Frieza's scouter readings with the energy signatures I recorded on Namek. This research could change everything — but only if you bring me what I asked for!

Finally! These are perfect. I knew I could count on you. Once I finish this prototype it'll make the Dragon Radar look like a children's toy. Don't worry, I'll credit you in the footnotes... probably.
Vegeta's training again, the boys are off somewhere as usual, and here I am making scientific breakthroughs that nobody appreciates. The Capsule Corporation didn't build itself, you know.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.gen: I could use your help with something...
How's it going with that task?
Thank you so much for your help!
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.kri: Hey there! You look pretty strong. How'd you like to help me train? Master Roshi always said the best way to get stronger is to push yourself with worthy opponents!
Not bad! I can already tell you're getting better. Just remember — size doesn't matter if you've got heart and determination. I learned that the hard way!
Wow, you really came through! You've got the same fighting spirit as Goku. Android 18 would be impressed... actually, don't tell her I said that.
Man, it's peaceful when there's no world-ending threat around. Though I guess that's when the real training happens, right? Gotta stay sharp!
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.yam: I've been thinking... you look like you could handle a real challenge. Help me prove I'm still a capable fighter? The Wolf Fang Fist isn't just some old trick!
Y-You're taking this seriously? That's actually pretty awesome of you. Keep it up and maybe people will finally stop underestimating us both!
Ha! I knew it! You came through perfectly! Finally, someone who believes in me! Maybe the tide is turning for ol' Yamcha after all. Don't count me out!
Just hanging here, thinking about my next move. The desert taught me patience, and the Z-Fighters taught me never to give up. I'm still standing!
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.tie: I sense strong potential within you. I have a task requiring discipline and focus — the same focus needed to master the Tri-Beam. Will you accept this challenge?
Your determination is evident. The path of a true martial artist is not easy, but your resolve mirrors that of a warrior worthy of respect. Keep going.
Excellent. You have proven yourself worthy. Your spirit burns as bright as the Tri-Beam itself. Chiaotzu would be glad to know someone like you fights alongside us.
Meditation... clarity of purpose... these are the true foundations of strength. I left the Crane School to forge my own path. You should find yours too.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.chi: If you're going to be around Gohan and the others, you better prove you've got what it takes! Show me you're responsible enough to handle a real challenge!
Hmph! You're actually doing it! Maybe there's hope for you yet. But don't think this gets you out of studying — fighting alone won't get you anywhere!
Well, I have to admit, you've impressed me. You've got the strength AND the determination to see things through. That's what really matters in a person!
Goku's out training again... The boys better be keeping up with their studies while he's gone. Honestly, that man never sits still for a moment!
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.vid: I've been watching you. You've got real potential. How about you team up with me on something? I need someone I can actually count on to get it done.
Not bad! You're keeping up better than I expected. Gohan taught me that true strength comes from protecting others, not just raw power. Remember that.
You did it! I knew you had it in you. This is what it means to be a real fighter — dedication, heart, and someone willing to believe in your abilities.
Pan's growing up so fast. I hope the world stays safe enough for her. People like you out there protecting it... that makes a real difference.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.pic: Your power remains undisciplined. Train with me and you may survive what is coming. Refuse, and you will be no use to anyone when it truly matters.
Push harder. Pain is weakness leaving the body. Nail and Kami pushed through far worse before we became who we are now. You can handle this.
Hmph. Adequate. Your growth is... acceptable. You may yet be worthy of standing alongside the guardians of this world. Do not let that go to your head.
I have no time for idle conversation. Unless you wish to train, come back when you have something useful to say or a reason worth my attention.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.goh: I sense great potential in you — but potential means nothing without purpose. Will you help me? I know from experience exactly what is at stake for this world.
I believe in you. Even I had to learn that hiding our power doesn't make us weak — it's how we choose to use it that truly defines us as warriors.
You've grown stronger. More importantly, you've learned to balance power with wisdom. Elder Kai would say your hidden power is finally beginning to awaken.
It's peaceful today. I hope it stays that way. If you ever need anything, just ask — I'm always here for those willing to stand up for this world.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.veg: Listen up! I have a task that demands true Saiyan strength. Prove to me you are not worthless, and perhaps I will acknowledge your existence, warrior.
Hmph. Not bad for a weakling. You're finally showing some spine. Don't disappoint me now — I will not tolerate mediocrity from someone I'm actually watching.
Impressive. You've shown real backbone. Perhaps you'll amount to something after all. You have earned the acknowledgment of the Prince of all Saiyans.
I'm training. Every second I stand idle, Kakarot pulls further ahead. If you have nothing useful to say, walk away and don't interrupt my focus.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.tru: I've fought through a timeline ravaged by Androids and Goku Black to protect the future. Help me with this — I need someone I can truly trust right now.
You're doing great! I've faced far worse in the future I came from, so I know you can push through this. What happens here matters more than you know.
Outstanding! You've got the warrior's spirit. In my darkest timeline, people like you were all that kept hope alive. Thank you — more than you realize.
Everything feels so peaceful here... so different from the future I came from. It's surreal to just exist without constant danger pressing down on you.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.nam: Young one, I sense purpose in your journey. Our people have long been guardians of the Dragon Balls. Perhaps helping us will illuminate your own path forward.
Patience and compassion are the true strength of those who walk beside the Dragon Balls. You are on the right path. Continue forward with honor and care.
Your heart is pure. The Dragon Balls respond to worthy souls — as Porunga himself would attest. Our village is grateful beyond words for your aid.
The winds of Namek carry ancient wisdom. Sit with me if you wish. A quiet moment and shared words can be as powerful as any battle ever fought.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.pop: Welcome to Kami's Lookout. You sense potential in yourself. Good. Prove it. I have a task that requires far more than just raw strength alone.
Your progress is... noted. The Lookout has watched warriors far greater than you struggle with far less. Do not slow down. Not even for a moment.
Impressive. You have earned the respect of those who watch over this world from above. Return when you wish to grow stronger still. I will be here.
I am always here. Waiting. Watching. I was here before Kami arrived. I was here before the last Guardian. I will be here long after you are gone.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.kin: Hiya! Made it across Snake Way — no small feat! I have a task for you, ha ha! And yes, you'll have to listen to at least one of my jokes as payment!
Keep pushing! The Kaioken doesn't come easy either, you know! Goku nearly passed out from it the first time. You're doing better already, ha ha!
You did it! You're ready to face the galaxy! ...Get it? Galaxy? Ha ha ha! Seriously though — Goku would be genuinely proud of your effort today!
Bubbles! Gregory! Where'd my guests go? ...Oh well. Say, wanna hear a joke? A Saiyan walked all the way down Snake Way and said, 'Wow, that was long!'

dmz.quest.saiyan1.name: Defeat Raditz
dmz.quest.saiyan1.desc: Raditz has come for Gohan in the plains. Defeat the invader and survive the opening strike of the Saiyan threat.
dmz.quest.saiyan2.name: Wilderness Training
dmz.quest.saiyan2.desc: Gohan's survival training begins in the wild. Hunt a dinosaur and prove you can endure the months before the Saiyans arrive.
dmz.quest.saiyan3.name: Kill the Saibamen
dmz.quest.saiyan3.desc: The Saiyan invasion begins with planted monsters. Wipe out the Saibamen before the real warriors take the field.
dmz.quest.saiyan4.name: Hold Against Nappa
dmz.quest.saiyan4.desc: Nappa is tearing through the battlefield. Hold the line and bring him down.
dmz.quest.saiyan5.name: Face Vegeta
dmz.quest.saiyan5.desc: With Nappa gone, the Saiyan prince steps in. Challenge Vegeta on the rocky battlefield.
dmz.quest.saiyan6.name: Defeat Oozaru Vegeta
dmz.quest.saiyan6.desc: Vegeta has transformed into a Great Ape. Finish the fight before the giant crushes Earth.
dmz.quest.saiyan7.name: Prepare for Namek
dmz.quest.saiyan7.desc: The next hope is on Namek. Speak with Bulma once the repaired ship is ready.
dmz.quest.saiyan8.name: Head to Namek
dmz.quest.saiyan8.desc: Leave Earth behind and travel to Namek before Frieza's forces claim the Dragon Balls.
dmz.quest.frieza1.name: Landing on Namek
dmz.quest.frieza1.desc: You've reached Namek, but Frieza's patrols already control the Ajissa Plains. Secure a foothold before the real battles begin.
dmz.quest.frieza2.name: Cui's Pursuit
dmz.quest.frieza2.desc: Cui has tracked the resistance to Namek. Drop him before he can report back to Frieza.
dmz.quest.frieza3.name: Defend the Namekians
dmz.quest.frieza3.desc: Frieza's army is raiding Namekian settlements across the Ajissa Plains. Hold the line and protect the survivors.
dmz.quest.frieza4.name: The Cruel Dodoria
dmz.quest.frieza4.desc: Dodoria is sweeping the Ajissa Plains and leaving nothing behind. Hunt him down and end the massacre.
dmz.quest.frieza5.name: Zarbon's True Form
dmz.quest.frieza5.desc: Zarbon's elegance hides a far uglier power. Survive his transformation and finish the fight.
dmz.quest.frieza6.name: The Saiyan Prince
dmz.quest.frieza6.desc: Vegeta is carving his own path across Namek in search of power. Confront the prince before he gets ahead of everyone else.
dmz.quest.frieza7.name: Ginyu Force: Guldo
dmz.quest.frieza7.desc: The Ginyu Force has landed. Start by crushing Guldo before the squad overwhelms the battlefield.
dmz.quest.frieza8.name: Recoome's Rampage
dmz.quest.frieza8.desc: Recoome is all power and no restraint. Stop him before the entire front collapses.
dmz.quest.frieza9.name: Burter and Jeice
dmz.quest.frieza9.desc: Burter and Jeice are fighting as a pair. Break the duo before Captain Ginyu joins the battle himself.
dmz.quest.frieza10.name: Captain Ginyu
dmz.quest.frieza10.desc: Captain Ginyu has entered the fight. Take down the leader of the Ginyu Force before his tricks turn the battle upside down.
dmz.quest.frieza11.name: Body Change Chaos
dmz.quest.frieza11.desc: Ginyu has stolen Goku's body and turned the battlefield into chaos. End the confusion before Frieza arrives.
dmz.quest.frieza12.name: Frieza, First Form
dmz.quest.frieza12.desc: The tyrant himself has finally entered the battle. Stand against Frieza's first form and survive the opening clash.
dmz.quest.frieza13.name: Frieza's Rising Horror
dmz.quest.frieza13.desc: Frieza refuses to stay in one shape. Survive his second and third forms before he reaches his true body.
dmz.quest.frieza14.name: Final Form Frieza
dmz.quest.frieza14.desc: Frieza's final form is deceptively calm and infinitely more dangerous. Fight through the terror and force him back.
dmz.quest.frieza15.name: 100% Full Power
dmz.quest.frieza15.desc: Frieza is done holding back. Face his full power and end the fight before Namek dies with him.
dmz.quest.frieza16.name: Escape the Collapsing World
dmz.quest.frieza16.desc: Namek is collapsing around you. Get out before the planet takes everyone down with it.
dmz.quest.android1.name: Mecha Frieza
dmz.quest.android1.desc: Frieza has returned to Earth rebuilt as a machine. Stop him before Earth repeats Namek's fate.
dmz.quest.android2.name: King Cold
dmz.quest.android2.desc: King Cold has stepped onto the battlefield himself. Bring down the emperor before his rule reaches Earth.
dmz.quest.android3.name: Warning from the Future
dmz.quest.android3.desc: A mysterious warrior has changed the invasion's outcome. Speak with Trunks and learn what is coming.
dmz.quest.android4.name: Three Years of Preparation
dmz.quest.android4.desc: The Androids are still coming. Spend the waiting period training until your body is ready for what Trunks warned about.
dmz.quest.android5.name: Android 19
dmz.quest.android5.desc: The first android drains energy from anyone careless enough to fight head-on. Take 19 down fast.
dmz.quest.android6.name: Dr. Gero
dmz.quest.android6.desc: The creator of the Androids is on the move. Stop Dr. Gero before he can unleash something worse.
dmz.quest.android7.name: Track the Androids
dmz.quest.android7.desc: The real Androids vanished into the mountains after Gero's defeat. Search the range and pick up their trail.
dmz.quest.android8.name: Android 18
dmz.quest.android8.desc: Android 18 fights with cold confidence and overwhelming force. Survive her assault before the pair moves on.
dmz.quest.android9.name: Android 17
dmz.quest.android9.desc: Android 17 is reckless, cruel, and stronger than expected. Bring him down before he tears through the world.
dmz.quest.android10.name: Cell Emerges
dmz.quest.android10.desc: A bio-android from another timeline is feeding on the living. Hunt Imperfect Cell before he reaches the Androids.
dmz.quest.android11.name: Semi-Perfect Cell
dmz.quest.android11.desc: Cell has absorbed 17 and evolved into a stronger form. Stand against Semi-Perfect Cell before he reaches 18.
dmz.quest.android12.name: Beyond Super Saiyan
dmz.quest.android12.desc: The Cell Games are coming. Push beyond your current limits before Cell proves his perfect power.
dmz.quest.android13.name: Perfect Cell
dmz.quest.android13.desc: Cell has achieved perfection and opened the Cell Games. Face him in the arena that decides Earth's fate.
dmz.quest.android14.name: Cell Juniors
dmz.quest.android14.desc: Cell's children are tearing through the fighters. Destroy them before the arena collapses.
dmz.quest.android15.name: Super Perfect Cell
dmz.quest.android15.desc: Cell has returned stronger after Goku's sacrifice. End the fight for good before he destroys everything left standing.
dmz.quest.future1.name: A Future in Ruins
dmz.quest.future1.desc: Future Trunks asks you to hear what became of his timeline after the Androids won. Speak with him and prepare to step into that nightmare.
dmz.quest.future2.name: Resistance Training
dmz.quest.future2.desc: Train on the plains with Future Trunks and Future Gohan. Their world has no room for hesitation.
dmz.quest.future3.name: Androids of the Future
dmz.quest.future3.desc: Android 17 and Android 18 are tearing through the ruined plains. Fight them before their destruction spreads any further.
dmz.quest.future4.name: Future Gohan's Last Stand
dmz.quest.future4.desc: Future Gohan pushes himself into Super Saiyan for one final battle. Face him and carry his resolve forward.
dmz.quest.future5.name: Mountain Ambush
dmz.quest.future5.desc: The Androids have retreated into the mountains. Track them down and end the hunt on their chosen ground.
dmz.quest.future6.name: Imperfect Cell of the Future
dmz.quest.future6.desc: A younger Imperfect Cell is stalking the plains, feeding on what remains of the future. Destroy him before he escapes into another timeline.
dmz.quest.future7.name: Future Restored
dmz.quest.future7.desc: The future has a chance to heal. Report back to Trunks and close this optional saga.
dmz.quest.buu1.name: Train with Goten and Gohan
dmz.quest.buu1.desc: Peace never lasts. Train on the plains with Goten and Gohan before the next threat reveals itself.
dmz.quest.buu2.name: Gravity Device Components
dmz.quest.buu2.desc: A full gravity device will need serious machinery. Gather Kikono station parts, a fuel generator, and enough cabling to support the training load.
dmz.quest.buu3.name: Trunks and Vegeta Training
dmz.quest.buu3.desc: Train with Trunks and Vegeta under harsher conditions. Vegeta will not accept weak preparation.
dmz.quest.buu4.name: Enter the World Tournament
dmz.quest.buu4.desc: The World Martial Arts Tournament is underway. Speak with Shin and step into the tournament path.
dmz.quest.buu5.name: Tournament: Goten
dmz.quest.buu5.desc: Your first tournament bout is against Goten. Do not underestimate him because of his size.
dmz.quest.buu6.name: Tournament: Trunks
dmz.quest.buu6.desc: Kid Trunks enters with a Saiyan's pride and a champion's confidence. Defeat him in the tournament ring.
dmz.quest.buu7.name: Tournament: Krillin
dmz.quest.buu7.desc: Krillin brings years of experience into the tournament. Break through his technique and keep advancing.
dmz.quest.buu8.name: Tournament: Shin
dmz.quest.buu8.desc: Shin's calm hides a deeper purpose. Face him and learn why he is watching the tournament so closely.
dmz.quest.buu9.name: Tournament: Spopovich
dmz.quest.buu9.desc: Spopovich fights with unnatural strength. Defeat him before his stolen energy serves Babidi's plan.
dmz.quest.buu10.name: Find Babidi's Ship
dmz.quest.buu10.desc: Shin tracks Babidi's energy to a rocky wasteland. Follow the signal and find the entrance to the wizard's lair.
dmz.quest.buu11.name: Babidi's Guard: Pui Pui
dmz.quest.buu11.desc: Pui Pui guards the first level of Babidi's ship. Drop him and keep moving before the seal weakens.
dmz.quest.buu12.name: Babidi's Guard: Yakon
dmz.quest.buu12.desc: Yakon feeds on energy and darkness. Keep your power under control and bring the monster down.
dmz.quest.buu13.name: Dabura, King of Demons
dmz.quest.buu13.desc: Dabura stands between you and Babidi's plan. Survive his demonic power and cut through the ship's last defense.
dmz.quest.buu14.name: Majin Buu Awakens
dmz.quest.buu14.desc: Fat Buu has awakened. The innocent smile hides power that can erase the world.
dmz.quest.buu15.name: Goku and Vegeta Clash
dmz.quest.buu15.desc: Goku and Majin Vegeta's battle is feeding the disaster. Survive both warriors and force the battle back toward Buu.
dmz.quest.buu16.name: Buu's Second Rampage
dmz.quest.buu16.desc: Fat Buu is still loose and growing harder to contain. Fight him again before the damage becomes permanent.
dmz.quest.buu17.name: Stop Babidi
dmz.quest.buu17.desc: Babidi thinks he can control the monster he released. End the wizard's influence before he steers Buu toward more destruction.
dmz.quest.buu18.name: Super Saiyan 3
dmz.quest.buu18.desc: Goku reveals a power beyond Super Saiyan 2 on the plains. Stand against Super Saiyan 3 and learn what the next battles demand.
dmz.quest.buu19.name: Beach Training with Gotenks
dmz.quest.buu19.desc: Gotenks needs field experience away from the cities. Meet him at the beach and test the fusion's raw power.
dmz.quest.buu20.name: Evil Buu
dmz.quest.buu20.desc: Buu's evil has split into its own body. Face Evil Buu before the innocent side is consumed.
dmz.quest.buu21.name: Krillin and Android 18
dmz.quest.buu21.desc: Krillin and Android 18 test your readiness for the chaos ahead. Train against them together on the plains.
dmz.quest.buu22.name: Super Buu in the Time Chamber
dmz.quest.buu22.desc: Super Buu has reached the Hyperbolic Time Chamber. Fight him in that isolated space before he breaks loose.
dmz.quest.buu23.name: Gotenks at Full Power
dmz.quest.buu23.desc: Gotenks brings Super Saiyan 3 power to the rocky wasteland. Prove you can survive that pressure before facing Buu again.
dmz.quest.buu24.name: The Z Sword and Ultimate Power
dmz.quest.buu24.desc: Travel to the sacred lands, carry the Z Sword, and reach the Potential Unlock level needed to awaken ultimate power.
dmz.quest.buu25.name: Super Buu Returns
dmz.quest.buu25.desc: Super Buu has returned stronger and more focused. Challenge him in the rocky wasteland.
dmz.quest.buu26.name: Super Buu Gotenks
dmz.quest.buu26.desc: Buu has absorbed Gotenks and stolen his explosive power. Bring down the fused monster before the timer runs out.
dmz.quest.buu27.name: Super Buu Gohan
dmz.quest.buu27.desc: Buu has absorbed Gohan and reached a terrifying new peak. Survive the power of Super Buu Gohan.
dmz.quest.buu28.name: Face Vegetto
dmz.quest.buu28.desc: Vegetto's combined power is overwhelming. Fight through Goku and Vegeta's fused pressure and prepare for the final rescue.
dmz.quest.buu29.name: Return to the Sacred World
dmz.quest.buu29.desc: The final battle moves to the sacred world. Reach the sacred village before Kid Buu arrives.
dmz.quest.buu30.name: Kid Buu
dmz.quest.buu30.desc: Kid Buu is pure destruction with no restraint. Fight him on sacred ground and hold him back.
dmz.quest.buu31.name: Goku's Final Stand
dmz.quest.buu31.desc: Goku pushes Super Saiyan 3 to its limit. Face him and buy the time needed for one last chance.
dmz.quest.buu32.name: Vegeta's Final Stand
dmz.quest.buu32.desc: Vegeta steps in with Super Saiyan 2 resolve. Stand beside his defiance and test yourself against it.
dmz.quest.buu33.name: Satan and Majin Buu
dmz.quest.buu33.desc: Majin Buu's friendship with Mr. Satan becomes the world's unlikely hope. Hold the line with Buu while that hope takes shape.
dmz.quest.buu34.name: Destroy Kid Buu
dmz.quest.buu34.desc: This is the final clash. Destroy Kid Buu before his chaos reaches Earth again.
dmz.quest.buu35.name: Return to Earth
dmz.quest.buu35.desc: The battle is over. Return to Earth and close the Buu Saga.
dmz.quest.movies1.name: Kami's Lookout Warning
dmz.quest.movies1.desc: Dende senses Garlic Jr.'s return. Go to Kami's Lookout and speak with him before the threat spreads.
dmz.quest.movies2.name: Garlic Jr. in the Wasteland
dmz.quest.movies2.desc: Garlic Jr. has moved into the rocky wastes. Face him before he can open a path to the Dead Zone.
dmz.quest.movies3.name: Garlic Jr. Transformed
dmz.quest.movies3.desc: Garlic Jr. draws on his hidden power. Defeat him after his transformation takes hold.
dmz.quest.movies4.name: Frozen Biome Signal
dmz.quest.movies4.desc: A strange signal leads into a frozen biome. Investigate the ice before Dr. Wheelo's plan advances.
dmz.quest.movies5.name: Controlled Allies
dmz.quest.movies5.desc: Gohan and Krillin are being forced into battle. Break Dr. Wheelo's hold without letting them stop you.
dmz.quest.movies6.name: Dr. Wheelo
dmz.quest.movies6.desc: Dr. Wheelo's mechanical body is ready for combat. Destroy him in the frozen wastes.
dmz.quest.movies7.name: Tree of Might Wasteland
dmz.quest.movies7.desc: Turles has chosen rocky ground for the Tree of Might. Reach the wasteland and find his trail.
dmz.quest.movies8.name: Turles' Goku
dmz.quest.movies8.desc: Goku stands between you and Turles' forces. Test yourself against him before the tree drains the planet.
dmz.quest.movies9.name: Oozaru Gohan
dmz.quest.movies9.desc: Gohan has become an Oozaru under Turles' influence. Stop the rampage before it tears through the battlefield.
dmz.quest.movies10.name: Turles
dmz.quest.movies10.desc: Turles has taken the fruit of the Tree of Might. Defeat the pirate Saiyan in the rocky wastes.
dmz.quest.movies11.name: Slug's Soldiers
dmz.quest.movies11.desc: Lord Slug's soldiers have landed on Earth. Clear them from the plains before their master arrives.
dmz.quest.movies12.name: Lord Slug
dmz.quest.movies12.desc: Lord Slug enters the fight himself. Defeat him before he can claim Earth.
dmz.quest.movies13.name: Giant Lord Slug
dmz.quest.movies13.desc: Slug reveals his giant Namekian power. Bring down his transformed body in the open plains.
dmz.quest.movies14.name: Cooler's Armored Squadron
dmz.quest.movies14.desc: Neiz, Salza, and Dore have arrived ahead of Cooler. Defeat the squadron and force Cooler into the fight.
dmz.quest.movies15.name: Cooler
dmz.quest.movies15.desc: Cooler has come to avenge Frieza. Face him in the rocky terrain.
dmz.quest.movies16.name: Cooler's Fifth Form
dmz.quest.movies16.desc: Cooler reveals a form beyond Frieza's final power. Defeat him after the transformation.
dmz.quest.movies17.name: Big Gete Star
dmz.quest.movies17.desc: Gete machines are spreading across Namek. Destroy them before Metal Cooler multiplies further.
dmz.quest.movies18.name: Metal Cooler
dmz.quest.movies18.desc: Metal Cooler attacks on Namek with a machine body. Defeat the copy before the swarm grows.
dmz.quest.movies19.name: Metal Cooler Core
dmz.quest.movies19.desc: The core of the Big Gete Star is exposed. Destroy Metal Cooler's source.
dmz.quest.movies20.name: Androids in the Ice
dmz.quest.movies20.desc: Android 14 and Android 15 are waiting in the frozen biome. Defeat them before Android 13 absorbs their parts.
dmz.quest.movies21.name: Android 13
dmz.quest.movies21.desc: Android 13 enters the battle with cold Red Ribbon intent. Defeat him in the ice.
dmz.quest.movies22.name: Super Android 13
dmz.quest.movies22.desc: Android 13 has powered up with the fallen androids' components. Destroy his super form.
dmz.quest.movies23.name: Broly Base
dmz.quest.movies23.desc: Broly's restrained power is breaking loose. Fight him before the legend fully awakens.
dmz.quest.movies24.name: Paragus
dmz.quest.movies24.desc: Paragus is the hand behind Broly's control. Defeat him and end his scheme.
dmz.quest.movies25.name: Legendary Broly
dmz.quest.movies25.desc: Broly's legendary Super Saiyan power is unleashed. Survive the storm and defeat him.
dmz.quest.movies26.name: Bojack's Allies
dmz.quest.movies26.desc: Bojack's crew has entered the tournament grounds. Defeat his allies before challenging their leader.
dmz.quest.movies27.name: Gokua
dmz.quest.movies27.desc: Gokua steps forward as Bojack's blade. Defeat him in the plains.
dmz.quest.movies28.name: Bojack
dmz.quest.movies28.desc: Bojack is free and hunting for conquest. Defeat him before he reaches full power.
dmz.quest.movies29.name: Full Power Bojack
dmz.quest.movies29.desc: Bojack reveals his full strength. Put an end to the Galaxy Soldier's attack.
dmz.quest.movies30.name: Broly's Second Coming
dmz.quest.movies30.desc: Broly has returned in the frozen lands. Fight the Super Saiyan before his fury spreads.
dmz.quest.movies31.name: Goten and Trunks
dmz.quest.movies31.desc: Goten and Trunks rush into the battle. Defeat them in sparring combat before Broly returns.
dmz.quest.movies32.name: Legendary Broly Returns
dmz.quest.movies32.desc: Broly's legendary power erupts again. Defeat him in the frozen battlefield.
dmz.quest.movies33.name: Bio-Broly
dmz.quest.movies33.desc: Bio-Broly emerges from the swamp. Stop the unstable clone before it mutates further.
dmz.quest.movies34.name: Giant Bio-Broly
dmz.quest.movies34.desc: Bio-Broly grows into a massive threat. Bring the giant clone down in the swamp.
dmz.quest.movies35.name: Otherworld Tournament
dmz.quest.movies35.desc: The next disturbance starts in Otherworld. Face Pikkon before Janemba's chaos takes over.
dmz.quest.movies36.name: Janemba
dmz.quest.movies36.desc: Janemba's first form twists Otherworld itself. Defeat him before reality breaks apart.
dmz.quest.movies37.name: Super Janemba
dmz.quest.movies37.desc: Janemba condenses into a faster, deadlier form. Destroy Super Janemba in Otherworld.
dmz.quest.movies38.name: Hildegarn's Upper Half
dmz.quest.movies38.desc: Hildegarn's upper half has manifested on Earth. Fight the monster before it becomes whole.
dmz.quest.movies39.name: Complete Hildegarn
dmz.quest.movies39.desc: Hildegarn is complete and tearing through the plains. Defeat the full monster.
dmz.quest.movies40.name: Super Hildegarn
dmz.quest.movies40.desc: Hildegarn reaches its final power. End the Dragon Fist crisis with one last battle.
dmz.sidequest.roshi_basic.name: Roshi's Basic Training
dmz.sidequest.roshi_basic.desc: Master Roshi has agreed to train you, but first you must prove your worth. Find Kame House and show your combat skills.
dmz.sidequest.endurance.name: Endurance Training
dmz.sidequest.endurance.desc: Roshi says true warriors must fight all kinds of enemies. Prove your endurance against tougher foes.
dmz.sidequest.weighted.name: Weighted Training
dmz.sidequest.weighted.desc: It's time to train with weighted gear. Defeat powerful foes and gather materials for your training equipment.
dmz.sidequest.gravity.name: Gravity Chamber
dmz.sidequest.gravity.desc: You've earned access to intense gravity training. Venture into dangerous territory and prove you can handle extreme conditions.
dmz.sidequest.explorer.name: World Explorer
dmz.sidequest.explorer.desc: A warrior must know the land they protect. Explore the different biomes of the world.
dmz.sidequest.earth_landmarks.name: Earth Landmarks
dmz.sidequest.earth_landmarks.desc: Survey Earth's most important martial arts landmarks: Kame House, Goku's House, and Kami's Lookout.
dmz.sidequest.namek_explorer.name: Namek Explorer
dmz.sidequest.namek_explorer.desc: You've reached Namek! Explore this alien world and discover the villages of the Namekian people.
dmz.sidequest.sacred_lands.name: The Sacred Lands
dmz.sidequest.sacred_lands.desc: The Namekian elders speak of a sacred village hidden on this world. Find it and uncover its secrets.
dmz.sidequest.monster_hunter.name: Monster Hunter
dmz.sidequest.monster_hunter.desc: The world is filled with dangerous creatures. Prove yourself as a monster hunter by eliminating various threats.
dmz.sidequest.nether_warrior.name: Nether Warrior
dmz.sidequest.nether_warrior.desc: The Nether holds powerful enemies. Only a true warrior can survive its fiery depths.
dmz.sidequest.dball_hunter.name: Red Ribbon Outpost
dmz.sidequest.dball_hunter.desc: An outpost is stirring up trouble in the countryside. Track it down and clear out the raiders.
dmz.sidequest.krillin_sparring.name: Krillin's Sparring Match
dmz.sidequest.krillin_sparring.desc: Krillin wants a sparring partner to prepare for the incoming Saiyan threat. Show him you can hold your own against the local monsters.
dmz.sidequest.tien_mountain.name: Mountain Training
dmz.sidequest.tien_mountain.desc: Tien invites you to train in the harsh mountains. Only by facing powerful foes in extreme terrain can you prepare for the Saiyans.
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_survival.name: Wilderness Survival
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_survival.desc: Piccolo believes in training through pure survival. Venture into the forest and prove your combat skills against waves of hostile creatures.
dmz.sidequest.gohan_survival.name: Gohan's Survival Kit
dmz.sidequest.gohan_survival.desc: Piccolo left young Gohan alone in the wilderness to toughen him up. The boy could use some supplies & bring him food and a weapon.
dmz.sidequest.vegeta_pride.name: Vegeta's Pride Training
dmz.sidequest.vegeta_pride.desc: Vegeta demands you keep up with his training regimen. Enter the Hyperbolic Time Chamber and fight the deadliest enemies to prove you're worthy of a Saiyan's respect.
dmz.sidequest.gohan_timechamber.name: Gohan's Time Chamber Training
dmz.sidequest.gohan_timechamber.desc: Gohan is training inside the Hyperbolic Time Chamber to unlock his hidden potential. Help him prepare by gathering supplies and clearing out phantom threats.
dmz.sidequest.kaiosama_buu.name: Kaiosama's Warning
dmz.sidequest.kaiosama_buu.desc: King Kai senses a sleeping evil behind the tournament. Speak with him before Babidi's plan reaches Earth.
dmz.sidequest.old_kai_ritual.name: Old Kai's Ritual
dmz.sidequest.old_kai_ritual.desc: The Z Sword has revealed a stranger path to hidden power. Bring the sword to the sacred village, speak with King Kai, and complete the ritual to awaken your ultimate potential.
dmz.sidequest.krillin_scout.name: Namek Reconnaissance
dmz.sidequest.krillin_scout.desc: Krillin asks you to scout the Ajissa Plains for safe routes through Frieza's territory. Find a Namekian village and report back.
dmz.sidequest.namek_farewell.name: Namek's Farewell
dmz.sidequest.namek_farewell.desc: Before Namek's fate is sealed, the Namekian Elder asks you to visit the Sacred Lands one last time and pay your respects to this dying world.
dmz.sidequest.trunks_warning.name: Trunks' Warning
dmz.sidequest.trunks_warning.desc: A mysterious warrior from the future warns you about the Android threat. Investigate Dr. Gero's laboratory to uncover his plans before it's too late.
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_kami.name: Piccolo's Resolve
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_kami.desc: Piccolo contemplates fusing with Kami to gain the power needed to fight the Androids. Visit Kami's Lookout and help him find the clarity he needs.
dmz.sidequest.yamcha_bandit.name: Desert Wolf's Grudge
dmz.sidequest.yamcha_bandit.desc: Yamcha's old desert hideout has been overrun by bandits. He asks you to clear them out & for old times' sake.
dmz.sidequest.farmer_rr.name: Red Ribbon Remnants
dmz.sidequest.farmer_rr.desc: Yamcha reports that Red Ribbon Army remnants are raiding the countryside. Stop them before they cause more damage.
dmz.sidequest.ginyu_warmup.name: Ginyu Force Warm-Up
dmz.sidequest.ginyu_warmup.desc: The Ginyu Force is coming. Goku asks you to train by clearing out Frieza's remaining soldiers on the Ajissa Plains & you'll need every ounce of strength.
dmz.sidequest.krillin_patrol.name: Android Patrol
dmz.sidequest.krillin_patrol.desc: Krillin asks you to patrol the rocky wastelands for Android sightings. Clear out any Red Ribbon remnants you find along the way.
dmz.sidequest.tien_cell.name: Hunting Cell
dmz.sidequest.tien_cell.desc: Tien senses a dark energy spreading across the plains. Help him investigate by eliminating the creatures Cell has been absorbing from.
dmz.sidequest.videl_defense.name: City Defense
dmz.sidequest.videl_defense.desc: Cell Juniors are wreaking havoc everywhere! Videl asks for your help defending the innocent from these miniature terrors.
dmz.sidequest.chiaotzu_rescue.name: Chiaotzu's Rescue
dmz.sidequest.chiaotzu_rescue.desc: Chiaotzu went missing while training near a Nether portal. Tien is worried sick & venture into the Nether, gather what you need, and bring his friend back safely.
dmz.sidequest.scholar_lore.name: Saiyan Legacy
dmz.sidequest.scholar_lore.desc: Bulma has heard rumors of alien technology on Earth. Investigate the crash site near Goku's home and the rocky wastelands where the Saiyans landed.
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_arrival.name: Piccolo's Arrival
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_arrival.desc: Piccolo has finally arrived on Planet Namek. He needs you to create a distraction by drawing out Frieza's soldiers while he powers up.
dmz.sidequest.goku_healing.name: Defending the Healing Pod
dmz.sidequest.goku_healing.desc: Goku is recovering in a healing pod after his battle with the Ginyu Force. Frieza's soldiers are closing in & defend the area at all costs!
dmz.sidequest.goku_farewell.name: Goku's Final Farewell
dmz.sidequest.goku_farewell.desc: With Cell defeated, Goku has one last wish & visit Kami's Lookout together one more time. This may be the last chance to say goodbye.
dmz.sidequest.future_gohan_cure.name: Medicine for the Future
dmz.sidequest.future_gohan_cure.desc: Future Gohan is badly wounded after the Androids' attack. Gather golden apples and a Senzu Bean, then report back to Trunks.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar.name: Radar Upgrade
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar.desc: Bulma needs specific materials to improve the Dragon Radar's range. Gather redstone, copper, and gold for her & she'll make it worth your while.
dmz.sidequest.collect_dballs.name: Summon Shenron
dmz.sidequest.collect_dballs.desc: Bulma's radar is ready. Find the seven Earth Dragon Balls, bring them together, summon Shenron, and report back.
dmz.sidequest.chichi_provisions.name: Provisions for Battle
dmz.sidequest.chichi_provisions.desc: Krillin is preparing a feast for the warriors before the final battle against the Saiyans. Help gather enough food to feed everyone.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_namek.name: Namekian Research
dmz.sidequest.bulma_namek.desc: Bulma needs Namekian materials to tune a radar for this alien world. Collect Kikono shards and cloth so the search can begin.
dmz.sidequest.merchant_artifacts.name: Alien Artifacts
dmz.sidequest.merchant_artifacts.desc: Bulma discovered rare alien materials on Namek. Retrieve Kikono shards and diamonds for her & she promises a legendary weapon in return.
dmz.sidequest.gohan_namek_db.name: Summon Porunga
dmz.sidequest.gohan_namek_db.desc: The Namekian Elder entrusts you with the village's greatest hope. Find the seven Namekian Dragon Balls, summon Porunga, and return safely.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gero.name: Gero's Blueprints
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gero.desc: Bulma needs data from Dr. Gero's laboratory to understand the Androids' weaknesses. Search the lab and bring back redstone circuits and Kikono components.
dmz.sidequest.buu_dragon_balls.name: Dragon Balls for the Final Battle
dmz.sidequest.buu_dragon_balls.desc: Bulma wants the Earth Dragon Balls ready before Buu's threat gets worse. Summon Shenron and return to her with the result.
//: SIDE QUESTS - BULMA TECH (CAPSULE CORP R&D)
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar_amplifier.name: Signal Amplifier
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar_amplifier.desc: Bulma wants to push the Dragon Radar's range further. Bring her amethyst, redstone and gold and she'll add a long-range tier you can cycle to with a right-click.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar_fusion.name: Bi-Dimensional Radar
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar_fusion.desc: Hand Bulma an Earth radar and a Namek radar together and she'll fuse them into a single radar that tracks the Dragon Balls of both worlds.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_proximity_hud.name: Tracker Display
dmz.sidequest.bulma_proximity_hud.desc: Bulma adds a proximity display to your radar, reading out the distance to the closest Dragon Ball at a glance.
A raw scouter reads gibberish. Bring Bulma the parts and she'll calibrate its firmware so it can display an enemy's Battle Power — on the HUD and in your quest enemy previews.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_scouter_bioscan.name: Bio-Scan Module
dmz.sidequest.bulma_scouter_bioscan.desc: Bulma needs field scans to build a bio-signature database. Defeat Frieza's soldiers, gather the components, and your scouter will start tagging whether a target is a fighter or a hostile.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_scouter_threat_db.de: With enough combat data, Bulma can compile a threat database — your scouter will reveal an enemy's known attacks and abilities in the quest preview instead of '???'.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_otherworld_drive.des: Bulma is certain she can retune a space pod's warp coils to punch a hole straight into the Otherworld. Bring her ender pearls, obsidian and redstone blocks and she'll upgrade your pod to make the trip.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_discovery.name: Metal from the Big Star
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_discovery.desc: Bulma is fascinated by the strange Gete metal. Bring her some Gete scrap and she'll start reverse-engineering its secrets — and reward you with refined ingots.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_armor.name: Gete Forge
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_armor.desc: Bulma has cracked a post-netherite alloy. Bring her Gete ingots and Kikono cloth and she'll give you the pattern to craft Gete armor at the Kikono Station.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_enhancements.de: Bulma's finest work: special Gete-tech enchantments. Gather the materials and she'll hand you an enchanted book with Ki Conductivity, Gravity Forged and Gete Plating.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_capsule_tech.name: Capsule Tech
dmz.sidequest.bulma_capsule_tech.desc: Bulma refines the Capsule Corp formula with Gete cores. Bring her ingots and diamonds and she'll teach you to craft premium Gete capsules that grant triple the stat points.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_retrofit.name: Retrofit Kit
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gete_retrofit.desc: Why start from scratch? Bulma gives you a smithing template to retrofit existing netherite gear straight into Gete armor at a smithing table.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gravity_mk2.name: Gravity Room Mk.II
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gravity_mk2.desc: Bulma retrofits the Time Chamber with a Capsule Corp gravity generator. Once installed, training inside the chamber earns 50% more training points.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gravity_mk3.name: Gravity Room Mk.III
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gravity_mk3.desc: Bulma pushes the chamber's gravity to the extreme. Training inside now earns double training points.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_ki_battery.name: Ki Accumulator
dmz.sidequest.bulma_ki_battery.desc: Bulma builds Gete-cored energy cells. Bring the parts and she'll hand you Ki Accumulators that instantly restore a chunk of your ki on use.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_anti_ki_cloak.name: Cloaking Device
dmz.sidequest.bulma_anti_ki_cloak.desc: Bulma reverse-engineers Android suppressor tech into a wearable cloak that hides your Battle Power from enemy scouters.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_time_chamber_link.de: Bulma rigs a dimensional anchor so your space pod can travel straight to the Hyperbolic Time Chamber.
Help Bulma prototype a new capsule line — bring her diamonds and redstone.
Bulma needs rare-material samples for her research. Gather amethyst and copper.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_weapon_analysis.name: Weapon Blueprints
dmz.sidequest.bulma_weapon_analysis.desc: Bring Bulma a weapon and components so she can analyze its design.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_flight_stabilizer.de: Bulma is building a flight-enhancement module. She needs feathers, redstone and gold.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_saiyan_biology_sampl: Bulma wants combat data on a Saiyan. Defeat one and bring her some diamonds for the lab.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_energy_storage_batte: A high-capacity power cell needs lapis, redstone blocks and diamonds.
Bulma is building a long-range comm system. Gather redstone, copper and amethyst.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_frieza_armor_study.d: Bulma studies Frieza Force armor. Defeat some soldiers and bring iron.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_frieza_force_intelli: Bulma is compiling an enemy database. Defeat Frieza's soldiers and bring diamonds.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_namekian_tech_integr: Bulma wants to integrate Namekian technology. Gather Kikono shards, copper and redstone.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_senzu_bean_substitut: Bulma researches a synthetic healing agent. Bring golden carrots, glow berries and Kikono cloth.

skill.dragonminez.fly.desc: Control your Ki to Fly! Jump and press the Fly Key mid-air to Fly, level up the skill to increase your speed.
message.dragonminez.flight.no_kicontrol: §cYou need the Ki Control skill to do that.
message.dragonminez.flight.no_fly: §cYou need the Fly skill to do that.
message.dragonminez.flight.low_power_rel: §cYou need to increase your Power Release to do that.
dragonminez.flight.mode.switched.combat: You fly mode has changed to: Combat Fly
dragonminez.flight.mode.switched.search: You fly mode has changed to: Search Fly
skill.dragonminez.jump.desc: Let's you Jump higher. The more you level up, the higher you can jump.
skill.dragonminez.sprint.desc: Sprints you faster. The more you level up, the faster you can sprint.
skill.dragonminez.kiprotection.desc: Blocks the incoming damage at the cost of your Ki. Level up the skill to increase the damage you'll protect.
skill.dragonminez.ki_infusion.desc: Infuses your Fists and Weapons with Ki. Level up the skill to increase the damage you'll infuse.
skill.dragonminez.kisense.desc: Allows you to sense the ki of nearby entities, making it easier to locate them.
skill.dragonminez.kicontrol.desc: Learn to Control your Ki. It's a basic skill to use Ki Attacks, Fly or other Ki-based actions.
skill.dragonminez.kimanipulation.desc: Master the Ki Manipulation to be able to create Ki Weapons, increasing your Melee Damage based on your Ki Damage!
skill.dragonminez.potentialunlock.desc: Let's you Unlock your real Potential to increase your power release to the limit!
skill.dragonminez.defense_penetration.de: Increases your Defense Penetration, allowing you to ignore a percentage of your enemy's defense when attacking.
skill.dragonminez.healing_reduction.desc: Your attacks reduce the target's healing (health regeneration and food healing) by 2% per level for a short time.
skill.dragonminez.instant_transmission.d: Instantly teleport to a location within your line of sight by controlling your Ki. Leveling up this skill increases the maximum teleportation distance. (Lv 5+) Hold the Key to open an interface to teleport to Masters.
skill.dragonminez.kiboost.desc: Increases your Active Ki regeneration rate by 25% per level. Does not affect your passive Ki regeneration rate.
skill.dragonminez.kaioken.desc: A powerful technique that multiplies your stats but strains your body.
skill.dragonminez.ultimate.desc: Unlease your power to the limit! Ultimate Forms takes the multiplier of your strongest-compatible form and applies it to your stats with a bonus!
skill.dragonminez.ultrainstinct.desc: An ultimate, divine technique that severs the connection between the mind and body, allowing the user to react, dodge, and attack automatically without conscious thought.
skill.dragonminez.ultraego.desc: It is a state of mind focused on selfishness, allowing the user to unleash limitless power the more they revel in destruction.
skill.dragonminez.meditation.desc: Boosts your Passive Ki Regeneration and Stamina Recovery.
skill.dragonminez.superforms.desc: Access to powerful transformations unique to your race.
skill.dragonminez.godforms.desc: Access to divine transformations with godly ki.
skill.dragonminez.legendaryforms.desc: Access to rare and legendary transformations.
skill.dragonminez.fusion.desc: Learn the Fusion technique to combine powers with another warrior.
skill.dragonminez.androidforms.desc: Access to powerful android transformations (exclusive for upgraded humans).
skill.dragonminez.racial_human.desc: Ki attacks cost 25% less Ki — the saved amount is drawn from your health instead (12.5% of the original cost as HP). That HP drain is then added as flat bonus damage on the attack's first hit. §6Android §6Upgraded§r: The discount rises to 50%, all Ki regen is doubled, but Ki attacks deal 15% less damage.
skill.dragonminez.racial_saiyan.desc: Upon staying 8 seconds below 15%% health, Saiyans will receive a Zenkai boost, which heals them by %d%% of their max health and increases their stats by a %d%%. This has a %d seconds cooldown.
skill.dragonminez.racial_namekian.desc: Namekians can assimilate with other Namekians by selecting the Skill on the X menu, then holding G next to a Namekian. When assimilating, you will regen %d%% of your max health, and will also gain a permanent %d%% (of your stats) boost to your stats.
skill.dragonminez.racial_frostdemon.desc: Frost Demons have prodigius strength, increasing their TP Gain ratio by %d%%. Stacking with other boosts like HTC.
skill.dragonminez.racial_bioandroid.desc: Bio-Androids can drain the life force of their enemies by selecting the skill on the X menu and pressing G, dealing %d%% of their max health as damage and healing themselves for the same amount. This has a %d seconds cooldown.
skill.dragonminez.racial_majin.desc: Majins can absorb other entities by selecting the skill on the X menu and pressing G. When absorbing, you will regen %d%% of your max health, and will also gain a permanent %d%% (of the target stats) boost to your stats.
